channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytip in Chequers Parade, 10th June
item.description:
This cupboard unit has been dumped next to the large black bin next to 5/6 Chequers Parade by the junction with Tile Kiln Lane

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tile Kiln Lane, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

Trolley there over a week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29-33, Montpelier Vale, Blackheath, Greater London

item.title: Public litter bin next to bus stop V on Anerley Rd needs emptying, 10th June
item.description:
The bin is overflowing again, please can it be emptied and rubbish surrounding bin cleared away
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Flytip in Chequers Way, 10th June
item.description:
This rubbish has been dumped in the flower beds in Chequers Way near the junction with Tottenhall Rd

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tottenhall Road, Palmers Green
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture dumped, 10th June
item.description:
This appeared two days ago and myself and neighbours at number 4 aren’t responsible

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marmora Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping down alleyway 62., 10th June
item.description:
Fly tipping down alleyway 62.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Unit 1, Leigh Place, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Man hole cover loose after being removed. It now moves when walked on and is a trip hazard and noisy, 10th June
item.description:
The man hole cover was fine until it was removed by a utility company. It was replaced and then was wonky and moves when walked over. It makes a noise which it didn’t make before. I have since spoken to a different contractor who removed the cover to see what the problem was and it is defective, it seems the inside of the drain is degrading and the cover doesn’t fit properly. The cover now rocks when walked over and makes a loud noise which we can hear at all times of the day.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Avenue, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead leaves & brambles, 10th June
item.description:
Hi, Bern reporting this for some time, keep getting updates asking if ok now, and I reply no. Been a year a,least. The brambles come every year onto the paved walkway, pavement, and they rag your clothes, and bloody hurt and make your skin bleed when they catch on you, they cling to your pets hair, no choice as you need use pavement. Also those in wheelchairs etc have problems. This road leads into fallions health centre, at times most gave yo walk in road, yo avoid brambles, and it's full of leaves 🍃 taking up the path too. Walking in the road dangerous as cars cone speading into the road at times.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bentham Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drains, 10th June
item.description:
Construction site has been blocking up drains with concrete and rubbish. Causing problems and water overflow at times

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wolsley Close, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flying tipping on the street, 10th June
item.description:
Lots of food waste on the floor and fly tipping rubbish, very messy

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Arcola Street, Hackney, London

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Firs Close, Honor Oak, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned and taxed vehicle, 10th June
item.description:
This is yet another untaxed vehicle which has been dumped opposite my property. Parking is extremely difficult for visitors and this is becoming a regular occurrence. Vrm of untucked vehicle is: GJ14 CJU This relates to a black Ford
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, The Drive, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Needs clearing please.

item.title: Low hanging brances, 10th June
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hutchins Road, Thamesmead

item.title: Dog poo clearance, 10th June
item.description:
There is dog poo outside of a pharmacy and restaurant which needs clearance as this is a health and safety issue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 127, Bellenden Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish across pavement, 10th June
item.description:
Household rubbish has been ripped open and now across pavement and road. Soiled nappies, dog poo bags and rotten food. Alongside fox poo.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goodrich Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: East street tps are sprayed, 10th June
item.description:
All the shared use timeplates are sprayed in east street, the market side area. zone M2.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
